title: 50PCS Self Adhesive Wiggle Googly Eyes 14mm Black White Eyes for DIY Scrapbooking Toys Accessories
features: Name: Wiggle Googly eyes with self-adhesive
Color: Black and White, Diameter: 14mm, Material: High quality environmentally friendly plastic

Wide Applications: Toy decorative accessories, perfect for child DIY. Peel off the back sticker and stick on the toys or anything you like, such as scrapbooks, puppets, dolls, pictures, drawings, birthday cards, and more! Conducive to the children's brain thinking, stimulate their imagination and creativity!
Packaging: Packaged in plastic boxes for easy use and storage, as well as to protect the product from compression. Enjoy it and make your life much interesting and happy!
